description:
WoundScan brings clinical-grade wound measurement to the bedside with the iPhone's LiDAR sensor.

Capture a 60-frame ARKit burst, get back surface area, volume, max depth, perimeter, tissue composition, and a healing trajectory in seconds — all auditable, all linked to a HIPAA-aware provider portal.

KEY FEATURES
• 3D wound capture with LiDAR + ARKit
• Volume, surface area, depth with 95% confidence intervals
• Quality scoring and live motion / lighting / distance guidance
• Provider portal: patient roster, claims, compliance, reports
• UDI-traceable graft tracking and Medicare reimbursement estimator
• Audit-safe note templates with SHA-256 hashing on sign

WoundScan is clinical decision support — not a diagnostic device. The clinician retains decision authority. Methodology is disclosed in every report.

For credentialed clinicians only. Requires an iPhone with a LiDAR sensor (iPhone 12 Pro or newer).
promotionalText: 3D wound measurement at the bedside. LiDAR capture, audit-ready reports, integrated provider portal.
